rationale: The empty set omits the concepts the definition is built from. 'A term t (def:term) is free for x in phi if no free occurrence of x (def:bound-free) lies within the scope (def:scope) of a quantifier ... ' and the equivalent formulation references the substitution phi[t/x] (def:subst-notation). All four load-bearing.
notes: def:variable (x, y) is ambient typing. This is a foundational node consumed by thm:rename (0041), lem:subst-formulas (0050), and the UI rule (0012), so its deps matter downstream. Multiple adds from [] -> low confidence routes to focused re-run; the exact set may be debated but [] was clearly wrong.
